    GpuProjectExec: expr=[i_item_id@0 as i_item_id, i_item_desc@1 as i_item_desc, s_store_id@2 as s_store_id, s_store_name@3 as s_store_name, sum(store_sales.ss_quantity)@4 as store_sales_quantity, sum(store_returns.sr_return_quantity)@5 as store_returns_quantity, sum(catalog_sales.cs_quantity)@6 as catalog_sales_quantity]
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[i_item_id, i_item_desc, s_store_id, s_store_name], aggr=[sum(store_sales.ss_quantity), sum(store_returns.sr_return_quantity), sum(catalog_sales.cs_quantity)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7064090
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_item_id@0, i_item_desc@1, s_store_id@2, s_store_name@3], 8), input_partitions=8

              GpuProjectExec: expr=[ss_quantity@2 as ss_quantity, sr_return_quantity@3 as sr_return_quantity, cs_quantity@4 as cs_quantity, s_store_id@5 as s_store_id, s_store_name@6 as s_store_name, i_item_id@0 as i_item_id, i_item_desc@1 as i_item_desc]
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7064090
                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(i_item_sk@0, ss_item_sk@0)], projection=[1, 2, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8]
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7064090
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_item_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
